reviews.review_description: This game is well worth a play!!! If you were a command and conquer fan, this is right up your alley. The game play is not very long. But well worth the price of admission. I really enjoyed this game, and am looking forward to seeing what they do with it. I love these kind of games, and this is the first one of its kind on standalone quest. It took way too long for this kind of game to come out, but it’s here now so I will stop complaining. Keep up the awesome work developers!!!

The AI voices really grate on me, the gameplay is fun and quite satisfying, reminiscent of command and conquer if it was in early access. 

Keep up the good work, with enough time this could be an absolute gem.
The game requires at least the performance of Quest2. Thank you and have fun. :)
